brand_identity.name: The Doggy Company
brand_identity.vibe: Organized Joy, Premium Playfulness, Trustworthy Warmth
brand_identity.target_audience: Urban Indian Dog Parents (25-45), Tech-savvy, Emotional Spenders

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Impact statements

primary.name: Royal Iris
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Brand Anchors

marketing.description: Asymmetrical bento grid. Mix of 2x2 (Hero), 1x1 (Feature), 1x2 (Tall) blocks.

dashboard.card_style: Flat white, 1px border-stone-200, no shadow until hover

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-violet-800 text-white hover:bg-violet-900 shadow-lg hover:shadow-violet-500/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white border-2 border-stone-200 text-stone-800 hover:border-violet-200 hover:bg-violet-50 transition-all

cards.feature: rounded-3xl bg-white border border-stone-100 shadow-xl shadow-stone-200/40 overflow-hidden group hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500
cards.product: rounded-2xl bg-white border border-stone-100 overflow-hidden hover:border-pink-200 transition-colors
cards.glass: rounded-3xl bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-lg

inputs.style: rounded-xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-violet-500/20 focus:border-violet-500 transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on solid backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Colored shadows! Use shadow-violet-500/10 instead of pure black shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders are boring. Use double borders or gradient borders for key elements.

hero.alt: Happy Corgi running in sunny park

do_not: Center text on mobile unless it's a headline.
Make buttons full width on desktop.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building the 'Pet Life OS'. It must feel like a premium, joyful operating system for dog owners. Use the 'Tetris Grid' for the homepage to showcase the 14 pillars. Use the 'High Density Bento' for the Member Dashboard. The 'Mira AI' widget must be a floating, glowing orb (use CSS animations) that is always accessible. Prioritize mobile responsiveness above all else.
